message:
fix(core,vdbe): fix all 4 remaining conformance failures — 938/938 pass

Fixes that bring conformance from 934→938 pass, 0 fail:

1. ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN column ordering (2 tests): Fixed
   payload_includes_rowid_alias_lazy to handle records written before
   multiple ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMNs. The heuristic payload_cols+1==table_cols
   only worked for single ADD COLUMN; now handles multi-ADD by decoding
   the integer at the IPK position and comparing to rowid. Also fixed
   reload_memdb_rows_from_txn_preserving_schema to pad short records
   with column defaults instead of erroring on column count mismatch.

2. EXISTS correlated self-join subquery (1 test): Added detection for
   self-referencing correlated EXISTS (WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t AS t2
   WHERE t2.a = t.a AND t2.id <> t.id)) and routes through connection-level
   execute_join_select fallback which correctly evaluates EXISTS per-row,
   bypassing the VDBE codegen bug with self-join cursor aliasing.

3. DELETE with correlated EXISTS WHERE (1 test): Same root cause as #2.
   Pre-collects matching rowids via connection-level evaluation, rewrites
   WHERE to simple rowid IN (...) before VDBE codegen.

Conformance: 938 pass, 0 fail, 8 ignored.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
